TRAI STARTUP INCUBATOR

Your Startup. Our Infrastructure. Unstoppable Growth.

We don't just invest — we co-build. Trai Incubator gives early-stage founders the engineering firepower, cloud infrastructure, and go-to-market systems they need to go from zero to funded.

INCUBATION TRACKS

Choose the track that matches your stage

🚀

Trai Catalyst — Zero to One

⏱ 6 Months

For first-time founders with a validated problem. We help you ship your MVP, set up your tech stack, acquire your first 10 paying customers, and build the foundation for scale.

  • ✔ Dedicated CTO-level engineering support
  • ✔ MVP architecture & development sprint
  • ✔ Product-market fit validation framework
  • ✔ First 10 customers acquisition playbook
  • ✔ Weekly founder-mentor standups
⚡

Trai Velocity — Seed to Series A

⏱ 12 Months

For startups with early traction. We scale your engineering team, automate your sales funnel, optimize unit economics, and prepare you for institutional fundraising.

  • ✔ Full-stack engineering team augmentation
  • ✔ Automated sales & marketing engine setup
  • ✔ Data analytics & KPI dashboard deployment
  • ✔ Investor deck & data room preparation
  • ✔ Warm introductions to 50+ VCs & angels

WHAT YOU GET

Everything a founder needs to ship and scale

🛠️

Elite Engineering Support

Direct access to senior solutions architects, full-stack developers, and DevOps engineers. We don't advise — we ship code alongside you.

☁️

Up to ₹50L in Cloud Credits

AWS, Google Cloud, and Azure credits so you can build, test, and scale without burning your runway on infrastructure.

📈

Automated Sales Engine

We deploy high-intent lead generation systems, CRM automation, and AI-powered outreach sequences to fill your sales pipeline from day one.

🎯

Go-to-Market Strategy

SEO, content marketing, performance ads, and social media — our growth team builds your digital presence while you focus on product.

💰

Investor Network Access

Warm introductions to top-tier VC firms, angel investors, and corporate venture arms in the enterprise tech space. We help you raise smart capital.

🏢

Workspace & Community

Co-working space at our Lucknow HQ, access to founder meetups, demo days, and a tight-knit community of builders who push each other forward.

HOW IT WORKS

From application to launch in 4 steps

01

Apply

Submit your application with your problem statement, early traction, and what you need help with.

02

Deep Dive

Our team reviews your application. Selected founders get a 1-on-1 call with our incubation lead.

03

Onboard

Accepted founders get a dedicated engineering pod, cloud credits, and a 90-day sprint plan.

04

Build & Ship

Weekly standups, monthly demos, and relentless focus on shipping product and acquiring customers.

IDEAL CANDIDATE

Who Should Apply?

  • → You have a clearly defined problem and a target customer segment
  • → You've done initial validation — conversations, waitlists, or early revenue
  • → You need engineering and infrastructure support, not just advice
  • → You're building in SaaS, AI/ML, FinTech, HealthTech, or Enterprise software
  • → You're ready to commit full-time and move fast

Ready to build something real?

Applications for our Q3 2026 cohort are open. We back founders who ship fast, think deeply, and refuse to quit.

Apply to Trai Incubator
